issues.title: q15 exact support regressed under minimum while breaker is clear (4/50)
issues.action: Treat this as support regression, not ordinary stagnation: keep support_route_verdict/support_progress/minimum_support_rows/gap_to_minimum plus the last-supported reference visible in probe/API/UI/docs, verify why the current bucket fell back under minimum, and keep breaker context explicit.
